title: Luffy on Amazon Lily
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Boa Hancock, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Amazon Lily conflict through Boa Hancock, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy on amazon lily.

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: Well then, you'll just have to die.

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: Why!? I just saw her back....!!

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: Take what you saw... to your grave!!

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: Why isn't he turning to stone....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: There's no way that's possible, sister!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's pathetic, but he's a lucky man....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I just wanted to see someone important!!
